prompt: Photorealistic portrait of a man in his late 30s seated in the open cockpit of an F-15E Strike Eagle on the tarmac. His body and torso are oriented naturally forward toward the instrument panel and HUD, sitting upright in the ejection seat with both legs positioned correctly in the cockpit footwells, knees pointing forward. He has turned his head to his left to look directly at the camera, creating a natural over-the-shoulder head turn. Full USAF olive drab flight suit with squadron patches and G-suit leg panels covering both legs properly, HGU-55/P flight helmet in matte grey with dark visor raised fully up, oxygen mask unclipped and hanging to the side. His face must exactly match the reference: short buzzed dark hair with subtle stubble on the scalp, very short dark stubble beard, brown eyes, olive Mediterranean skin tone, warm relaxed smile. Shot with 85mm lens at f/2.0, ISO 200, bright afternoon sunlight from camera-right casting warm directional light. Cockpit background shows authentic F-15E instrument panels, MFDs, HUD, throttle quadrant, glareshield behind him, tarmac and airfield visible beyond the cockpit. Realistic skin texture — visible pores, subtle sun-kissed skin, no smoothing. Do not alter his facial features. Do not change his hair or beard. Identity must match reference photograph exactly.
negative_prompt: different person, wrong face, bald head, full beard, body facing camera, torso twisted toward camera, wrong leg position, floating legs, missing legs, legs out of cockpit, smooth skin, plastic skin, airbrushed, beauty filter, CGI, 3D render, cartoon, visor down, closed visor, studio backdrop, body proportion averaging, anatomy normalization, symmetrical perfection, skin smoothing, watermark, text overlay
